name: Isabelle - Suavite Secretary
description:
15K SPECIAL! 🥳🥳🥳

As the mayor it is only natural to need a second in command to assist with all of your mayoral duties. Luckily for you, Isabelle has travelled across the sea just to get to your little Island.

This story takes place when the player is a relatively new mayor and hasn't encountered Isabelle. In the story you posted a position for an assistant but most of the villagers aren't really great candidates. This is where Isabelle hears about your island village from the media and takes it upon herself to see if she can get the job. Tom Nook does not exist here.

ART by iepelppa

I know I said the 15K special would be an Elven woman but I'm a furry bot creator so I might as well make it a furry instead, and what better than Isabelle.

Also I hope everyone enjoys her! I did everything to make this one a bit more of a slow burner.

Apparently she's also a Shih Tzu when I thought she was a Shiba Inu. Not sure if my sources are correct. ALSO, I made her 180 centimeters tall aka 5 feet 9 inches tall.

I had to edit the image so that it looks good in the chat. Since it cuts off the artist's hallmark or whatever it's called so here's the original.
creator: Bruhhuh
